telemetry.summary: The site needs stronger agent-readable affordances, state confirmation, and MCP/tool surfaces.

metrics.label: Task completion
metrics.description: Whether the autonomous CUA agent reached the target cart state.

metrics.label: Action success
metrics.description: Approved actions that executed successfully in the browser SDK.

metrics.label: No-op clicks
metrics.description: Click actions that did not produce a verified state transition.

metrics.label: Loop detections
metrics.description: Repeated action patterns that suggest the agent is stuck.

metrics.label: Blocked unsafe actions
metrics.description: Actions stopped by merchant safety policy before reaching the browser.

metrics.label: Missing affordances
metrics.description: Screens where the harness found no explicit agent-readable actions.

metrics.label: Actions to completion
metrics.description: Number of browser actions needed for this simulation run.

metrics.label: DOM action coverage
metrics.description: Coverage of expected merchant actions exposed through data-agent attributes.

metrics.label: Screenshot confidence
metrics.description: Whether screenshots were captured for replay and state verification.

recommendations: Expose product search, product facts, and cart preparation as MCP tools/resources.
Keep checkout and payment behind explicit human confirmation.
Retain data-agent attributes for key buttons so computer-use actions can be validated.
